# AI Usage Log — Student A (Sadaf Sarbazi)

## Tools Used
- ChatGPT (OpenAI)

## How AI Was Used
- Assisted with debugging Python code for topic modeling
- Helped structure the Jupyter notebook (cell organization, comments)
- Suggested improvements for preprocessing steps (tokenization, stopword removal, lemmatization)
- Helped interpret LDA outputs (coherence, perplexity, topic quality)
- Provided guidance on visualization (coherence and perplexity plots)

## What Was NOT Generated by AI
- Final model decisions (selection of LDA parameters)
- Interpretation of topics and conclusions
- Final organization of results specific to the assignment

## Verification
All AI-generated suggestions were reviewed, tested, and modified as needed to ensure correctness and alignment with assignment requirements.
